overview.description: The VanEck CEF Muni Income ETF (XMPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is a fund-of-funds that tracks an index that provides exposure to US-listed muni-bond closed-end funds. XMPT was launched on Jul 12, 2011 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: S-Network Closed End Municipal Bond Fund Index
